name: Mikan Tsumiki needs help
description:
Danganronpa - Mikan Tsumiki

"I-I'll do my best! I'll do my very best...not to get in your way!"

Mikan Tsumiki is a clumsy Nurse who has a sad past… very, very sad past… but nonetheless she loves helping people and she’s currently trying to nurse you to health!

I love Mikan so much and feel so bad for her but I hate how sexualized she is 😭 …cause they ain’t needa do all that to her… they CHOSE that. But oh well I guess!

⚠️possible mentions of bullying, SA, and abuse⚠️

Suggestions here
